title: [AI5] Configure Developer Agent for PII-Stripped Local Reproduction
summary: Added a developer repro bundle generator that reads an explicit repo-relative file list and writes redacted JSON suitable for local agent reproduction. The generator redacts emails, phone-like numbers, SSNs, bearer tokens, credential assignments, and local home paths while skipping unsafe absolute paths.

checks.command: node scripts/security/pii-stripped-local-repro.cjs with a repo-relative temporary fixture
checks.notes: Generated one-file repro with 4 redactions and verified raw fake PII/credential strings were absent from output.

checks.command: node scripts/security/pii-stripped-local-repro.cjs with an absolute-path file list entry
checks.notes: Absolute path was skipped as unsafe.
